/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/DeepSeekClient.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/DeepSeekClient.dir/DeepSeekClient_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DeepSeekClient.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DeepSeekClient.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o -o DeepSeekClient  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6WebEngineWidgets.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6WebEngineCore.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6WebChannel.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Positioning.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6PrintSupport.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Quick.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6QmlMeta.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6QmlWorkerScript.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6QmlModels.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Qml.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.9.2
